project.name: 发布系统 UI 设计
project.designRead: mobile publish flow / social creator / playful vibrant / information-dense / generic social app cliché
project.styleDefinitionBrief: Social media mobile publish system, pink-purple gradient primary, clean white surfaces, iOS-style rounded cards, playful creator-focused tone.

sharedProjectShellContract.fontStack: system sans-serif stack with PingFang SC
sharedProjectShellContract.surfaceDepthModel: border + surface layering; overlay shadow alpha ≤ 0.15

pages.title: 发布入口弹窗
pages.visualNorthStar: Bottom sheet popup overlay on dimmed content, pink-purple gradient primary CTA, clean white surface with drag handle, three action buttons arranged vertically
continuityAnchors: shared font stack system sans-serif with PingFang SC
shared text colors title #1A1A1A, secondary #666666, hint #999999

pages.title: 发布动态
pages.visualNorthStar: Full-screen mobile publish form, fixed top nav bar, text area with char counter, 9-grid image picker, option list rows with icons and switches
continuityAnchors: shared font stack system sans-serif with PingFang SC
shared text colors title #1A1A1A, secondary #666666, hint #999999

pages.title: 沙盒创作
pages.visualNorthStar: Full-screen sandbox publish form, purple-accent theme, sandbox icon in title bar, category tags, schedule timer toggle, preview and test share options, bottom dual-action bar
continuityAnchors: shared font stack system sans-serif with PingFang SC
shared text colors title #1A1A1A, secondary #666666, hint #999999
sandbox purple accent #C44DFF for save button and category tags

pages.title: IP 内容发布
pages.visualNorthStar: Full-screen IP publish form with IP binding card at top, gradient-tinted card background, crown/copyright icon in title bar, IP tags auto-generated, authorization dropdown, copyright toggle default on
continuityAnchors: shared font stack system sans-serif with PingFang SC
shared text colors title #1A1A1A, secondary #666666, hint #999999
